ai_chat.query: What is the percentage of the Bryan Bower that is contaminated based on the map

response.content: The map of Bryn Bower reveals significant contamination affecting various parts of the city.

response.title: Map of Bryn Bower indicating the contaminated areas
response.description: The water extraction prohibition zone (>20ppb) covers nearly 30% of the city including parts of downtown, indicating significant contamination.

content: This map indicates that areas like downtown Bryn Bower, Bryn East, and Brooklyn Ave are heavily impacted by groundwater contamination.

ai_chat.query: Kindly summarize the resolution of the southern illinois chapter

response.content: The Southern Illinois Chapter of the Chemical Workers Union (CWU) officially endorsed the offer made by Hallman Inc. to the City of Bryn Bower.
The union has supported Hallman Inc. during financial crises, negotiating contracts that benefited both workers and the company.

response.title: Resolution of the Southern Illinois Chapter of the Chemical Workers Union (CWU): Offer to the City of Bryn Bower by Hallman, Inc.
response.description: Endorsed Hallman's plans to handle the Exafluoran contamination and urged the city to accept the offer for the sake of financial stability and labor security.

response.content: The CWU believes that accepting Hallman's proposal will allow the city to effectively manage the environmental issues and enhance the financial predictability.
This support fosters a stable working environment for union members and secures jobs, reflecting the union’s strategy of solidarity and stability.
